subject: [PATCH 02/10] nfsd: drain callbacks and clear cl_cb_session

2026-05-28.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the NFS server (nfsd) where a session is freed while an RPC task still holds a reference to it, causing a use-after-free error. The patch introduces a two-stage drain mechanism in nfsd4_probe_callback_sync() to wait for all RPC tasks to complete before freeing the session. Additionally, clp->cl_cb_session is cleared unconditionally on error returns from nfsd4_process_cb_update(). This ensures that the NFS server properly handles session teardown and callback processing.
